message.content:
@startuml
title Update PractitionerRole

actor "Integrating application user" as user
participant "Integrating application" as app
participant "<FHIR API> HPI" as api
participant "HPI Practitioner Role database" as db

user -> app: Update PractitionerRole using hpi-practitionerrole-id
app -> api: PUT <Endpoint>/PractitionerRole/[hpi-practitionerrole-id]
activate api
api -> api: Validate[]
api -> db: Request
activate db
db --> api: 
deactivate db
api --> app: HTTP 200 reponse
deactivate api
app -> user: 

@enduml
